title: Villager Talk
description: Villager dialogue to add some extra flavor to your Minecraft world.
body:
Finally on 1.21.5.
Villagers will now talk when next to a player, sending their message in game chat, with a wide variety of phrases ranging from "Hello" to "Have you ever been to the old ruins outside the village?" and etc, about 800 phrases in total. A very basic mod! 
- Some villager lines depend on time of day, weather conditions, profession or even their biome.  
- They won't talk to you for a while if you hit them or if there's danger nearby.
- Added support for the [Guard Villagers](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers-(fabricquilt)) mod, they have normal and angry lines (thx CorruptTypes for the suggestion)
  



Works best with [Villager Names](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-names-serilum)
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e2fbb6dc01bb29805fba1bccce8cb72c2694acd.png)
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaf77abb4bb66227e6b9f1bc5641a3eec708dd75.png)[In action](https://gifyu.com/image/bL8ai)

### Todo list:
-  ̶p̶r̶o̶f̶e̶s̶s̶i̶o̶n̶ ̶s̶p̶e̶c̶i̶f̶i̶c̶ ̶l̶i̶n̶e̶s̶
- more specific reaction lines 
- repeating lines prevention system
-  ̶1̶.̶2̶1̶ ̶p̶o̶r̶t̶
- Config file/menu
### Contact:
Let me know if you want me to port it to any other versions

if you have any issues or suggestions, you can contact me at ratralfiofanov@gmail.com
